personas.name: Daily Meditation Subscriber
personas.description: A paying user who uses Headspace almost every day (meditation/sleep) and just wants the app to work smoothly.
goals: Finish a session without it stopping
Open the app and start a session quickly
Not lose progress or get kicked out mid-session
pain_points: The app crashes/freezes during a session
It loads slowly or lags before playing
The experience breaks the relaxation flow
context: Often used at night or when stressed
Sometimes switches to other apps (music/YouTube) and comes back
constraints: Crashes/lag should not happen during sessions

personas.name: Price-Sensitive User Considering Subscription
personas.description: A user who wants mindfulness help but feels the app is too expensive or too paywalled.
goals: Know what is free vs paid before paying
Decide if the subscription is worth it
context: Tries the app with a free trial or limited free content
Might switch to another app if it feels not worth it
constraints: The app should not trick users into paying

personas.name: Offline Listener and Downloader
personas.description: A user who downloads sessions/sleep content and expects offline mode to actually work.
context: Uses the app while traveling or with weak internet
Tries reinstall/cache clear/re-download but it still breaks
constraints: Offline playback should not need internet

personas.name: Returning User with Account/Access Issues
personas.description: A returning/long-time user who can’t log in or keeps seeing errors, even though they have an active subscription.
goals: Log in to the correct old account
Access paid sessions they already subscribed to
Stop getting blocked by repeated errors
pain_points: Login loops / wrong account / gets logged out
Error messages stop them from opening content
context: Changed phones or reinstalled the app
Needs the app for support but can’t access it
Talks to support but it takes too long
constraints: Active subscribers should not be locked out

personas.name: UX-Focused User Seeking Simplicity
personas.description: A user who wants a calm/simple app: easy navigation, less clutter, and small settings that reduce annoyance.
goals: Find a course/session and continue where they left off
Navigate without clutter or missing buttons
Adjust small settings (like haptics) to avoid distraction
pain_points: UI is cluttered and hard to find things
Notifications/flows are confusing or easy to miss
context: Uses the app to relax and avoid extra stimulation
Wants to track progress and continue a pathway
Prefers a simpler interface over lots of new content
constraints: Navigation should stay consistent after updates
Settings should reduce friction during relaxation
